name: @jellyfin-tv/shell-tizen-bootstrap
description: Hosted Shell Bootstrap (HSB) WGT — installed once on a Tizen TV via Samsung Device Manager GUI. Fetches ${server}/shell/shell.min.js at launch with a baked boot-shell.min.js fallback so every shell update afterwards is a server-side file swap (no sdb shell, no pkgcmd).

scripts.test: node scripts/selftest.cjs && node scripts/babel-transpile.test.cjs && node scripts/defer-watchdog.test.cjs && node scripts/boot-progress.test.cjs && node scripts/connect-form-parity.test.cjs && node scripts/iterator-resweep.test.cjs && node scripts/jel137-login-wedge.test.cjs
